title: Device Settings - All toggles ON - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Toggle buttons in Device Settings should persist their ON state after closing the tab, settings page, or restarting the app.
steps: Start Lens app with headset connected, go to Device Settings.
Open each tab and set all toggle buttons to ON.
Close and reopen each section — verify toggles remain ON.
Return to Device Home Screen, reopen Device Settings, check all sections — verify toggles remain ON.
Restart the app, reopen Device Settings, check each tab — verify toggles remain ON.
expected: All toggle buttons in Device Settings persist their ON state after closing the tab, settings page, or app.
